# Shalini Choudhary

> Marketing Strategist & Growth Specialist focusing on organic search systems, B2B demand generation, and marketing analytics (GA4).

Based in the UK (completing an MSc in Marketing Management at the University of Leeds) with 8+ years of agency and in-house experience across Ogilvy, GroupM, and GUS Global. 

---

## Core Services

- **[SEO Strategy Consultant](https://shalinichoudhary.in/seo-strategy-consultant.html)**: Frictionless technical SEO, intent mapping, and content architecture targeting scalable pipeline growth rather than vanity traffic.
- **[Growth Marketing Strategy](https://shalinichoudhary.in/growth-marketing-strategy.html)**: Aligning acquisition, product, and channels into cohesive compounding growth frameworks.
- **[Marketing Analytics (GA4)](https://shalinichoudhary.in/marketing-analytics-ga4-consultant.html)**: Setting up event-based tracking (GA4), tag management, and clean reporting systems focused on commercial outcomes.
- **[Conversion Optimisation Strategy](https://shalinichoudhary.in/conversion-optimisation-strategy.html)**: Improving landing page performance and aligning user experience (UX) to increase lead-to-pipeline conversion rates.

---

## Key Site Sections

- **[About Shalini](https://shalinichoudhary.in/about.html)**: Details on Shalini's background, professional credentials, education, and career experience.
- **[Insights / Blog Hub](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs.html)**: A collection of deep-dives and strategic insights on search, conversion, and measurement.
- **[Get in Touch](https://shalinichoudhary.in/contact.html)**: Contact options and booking details for growth strategy consults.

---

## Blog Categories & Resources

- **[AI & Modern Search](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs/ai-search.html)**: Discovering search evolution, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
- **[SEO Growth Strategy](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs/seo-strategy.html)**: Guides on link building, local SEO, content writing, and technical quick wins.
- **[Analytics & Measurement](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs/analytics-measurement.html)**: Strategic GA4 setup, user journey visualization, and dashboard tracking.
- **[Growth Strategy Insights](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs/growth-strategy.html)**: Frameworks, market trust, and high-level marketing decision making.
- **[Conversion Performance](https://shalinichoudhary.in/blogs/conversion-performance.html)**: Structured testing and optimization workflows.
